1	"""Action Dispatcher —— 把 Action JSON 翻译成真实的 Playwright 调用."""
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	
4	import time
5	from dataclasses import dataclass
6	from pathlib import Path
7	from typing import Any, Optional
8	
9	from playwright.sync_api import expect
10	
11	from typing import Callable
12	
13	from .cache import render_action
14	from .locator_resolver import locator_repr, resolve_locator
15	from .logger import StepLogger
16	from .schema import Action
17	
18	
19	@dataclass
20	class StepResult:
21	    step_no: int
22	    raw_text: str
23	    action: str
24	    locator_repr: Optional[str]
25	    status: str           # PASS | FAIL | HEALED
26	    duration_ms: int
27	    error: Optional[str] = None
28	    screenshot: Optional[str] = None
29	    resolved_html: Optional[str] = None
30	    heal_attempts: int = 0
31	    code: Optional[str] = None      # 等价的 Playwright 代码
32	
33	
34	class Executor:
35	    def __init__(
36	        self,
37	        page: Any,
38	        reports_dir: Path,
39	        logger: StepLogger,
40	        screenshot_every: bool = True,
41	        screenshot_on_failure: bool = True,
42	        default_timeout_ms: int = 10000,
43	        healer: Optional[Any] = None,  # SelfHealer 实例, 可选
44	    ) -> None:
45	        self.page = page
46	        self.reports_dir = reports_dir
47	        self.reports_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
48	        self.logger = logger
49	        self.shot_every = screenshot_every
50	        self.shot_fail = screenshot_on_failure
51	        self.default_timeout = default_timeout_ms
52	        self.healer = healer
53	
54	    # ---------- public ----------
55	    def execute(self, action: Action) -> StepResult:
56	        from .self_heal import is_healable
57	
58	        t0 = time.time()
59	        loc_repr = locator_repr(action.locator) if action.locator else None
60	        resolved_html = None
61	        status, err = "PASS", None
62	        heal_attempts = 0
63	
64	        try:
65	            resolved_html = self._dispatch(action)
66	        except Exception as e:
67	            err = f"{type(e).__name__}: {e}"
68	            status = "FAIL"
69	
70	        # 自愈
71	        if status == "FAIL" and self.healer is not None and action.action != "assert" and is_healable(err or ""):
72	            self.logger.console.print(f"  [yellow]↻ self-heal triggered for step {action.step_no}[/yellow]")
73	
74	            def _retry(new_action: Action) -> tuple[bool, Optional[str]]:
75	                try:
76	                    self._dispatch(new_action)
77	                    return True, None
78	                except Exception as e2:
79	                    return False, f"{type(e2).__name__}: {e2}"
80	
81	            heal = self.healer.heal(action, err or "", _retry)
82	            heal_attempts = heal.attempts
83	            if heal.healed and heal.new_action is not None:
84	                status = "HEALED"
85	                err = None
86	                loc_repr = locator_repr(heal.new_action.locator) if heal.new_action.locator else loc_repr
87	                action = heal.new_action
88	            else:
89	                err = heal.final_error or err
90	
91	        duration = int((time.time() - t0) * 1000)
92	        shot = None
93	        need_shot = (status == "FAIL" and self.shot_fail) or (status != "FAIL" and self.shot_every)
94	        if need_shot:
95	            shot = self._screenshot(action.step_no, status)
96	
97	        result = StepResult(
98	            step_no=action.step_no,
99	            raw_text=action.raw_text,
100	            action=action.action,
101	            locator_repr=loc_repr,
102	            status=status,
103	            duration_ms=duration,
104	            error=err,
105	            screenshot=str(shot) if shot else None,
106	            resolved_html=resolved_html,
107	            heal_attempts=heal_attempts,
108	            code=render_action(action),
109	        )
110	        self.logger.log_step(result)
111	        return result
112	
113	    # ---------- private ----------
114	    def _dispatch(self, a: Action) -> Optional[str]:
115	        timeout = a.timeout_ms or self.default_timeout
116	        loc = resolve_locator(self.page, a.locator) if a.locator else None
117	        resolved = None
118	        if loc is not None:
119	            try:
120	                resolved = loc.first.evaluate("el => el.outerHTML.slice(0, 200)")
121	            except Exception:
122	                resolved = None
123	
124	        act = a.action
125	        if act == "goto":
126	            self.page.goto(a.value, timeout=timeout)
127	        elif act == "reload":
128	            self.page.reload(timeout=timeout)
129	        elif act == "go_back":
130	            self.page.go_back(timeout=timeout)
131	        elif act == "fill":
132	            loc.fill(a.value, timeout=timeout)
133	        elif act == "type":
134	            loc.type(a.value, timeout=timeout)
135	        elif act == "clear":
136	            loc.clear(timeout=timeout)
137	        elif act == "press":
138	            loc.press(a.value, timeout=timeout)
139	        elif act == "click":
140	            # combobox 输入框常被透明 placeholder 遮挡, 用 force=True
141	            if loc.evaluate("el => el.getAttribute('role')") == "combobox":
142	                loc.click(timeout=timeout, force=True)
143	            else:
144	                loc.click(timeout=timeout)
145	        elif act == "dblclick":
146	            loc.dblclick(timeout=timeout)
147	        elif act == "hover":
148	            loc.hover(timeout=timeout)
149	        elif act == "check":
150	            loc.check(timeout=timeout)
151	        elif act == "uncheck":
152	            loc.uncheck(timeout=timeout)
153	        elif act == "select_option":
154	            loc.select_option(a.value, timeout=timeout)
155	        elif act == "upload_file":
156	            loc.set_input_files(a.value, timeout=timeout)
157	        elif act == "wait_for":
158	            loc.wait_for(state=a.state or "visible", timeout=timeout)
159	        elif act == "wait_for_url":
160	            self.page.wait_for_url(a.value, timeout=timeout)
161	        elif act == "wait_timeout":
162	            self.page.wait_for_timeout(int(a.value))
163	        elif act == "scroll_into_view":
164	            loc.scroll_into_view_if_needed(timeout=timeout)
165	        elif act == "screenshot":
166	            pass
167	        elif act == "assert":
168	            self._assert(loc, a)
169	        else:
170	            raise ValueError(f"未支持的 action: {act}")
171	
172	        return resolved
173	
174	    def _assert(self, loc, a: Action) -> None:
175	        timeout = a.timeout_ms or self.default_timeout
176	        t = a.assertion.type
177	        exp = a.assertion.expected
178	        ignore_case = a.assertion.ignore_case
179	        if t == "visible":          expect(loc).to_be_visible(timeout=timeout)
180	        elif t == "hidden":         expect(loc).to_be_hidden(timeout=timeout)
181	        elif t == "enabled":        expect(loc).to_be_enabled(timeout=timeout)
182	        elif t == "disabled":       expect(loc).to_be_disabled(timeout=timeout)
183	        elif t == "checked":        expect(loc).to_be_checked(timeout=timeout)
184	        elif t == "contains_text":  expect(loc).to_contain_text(str(exp), ignore_case=ignore_case, timeout=timeout)
185	        elif t == "has_text":       expect(loc).to_have_text(str(exp), ignore_case=ignore_case, timeout=timeout)
186	        elif t == "has_value":      expect(loc).to_have_value(str(exp), timeout=timeout)
187	        elif t == "has_count":      expect(loc).to_have_count(int(exp), timeout=timeout)
188	        elif t == "url_matches":
189	            import re as _re
190	            # 默认按"包含"语义: 把字符串转成 substring 正则; 若已是 re.Pattern 则直接用
191	            pattern = exp if hasattr(exp, "search") else _re.compile(_re.escape(str(exp)))
192	            expect(self.page).to_have_url(pattern, timeout=timeout)
193	        else:
194	            raise ValueError(f"未支持的 assertion: {t}")
195	
196	    def _screenshot(self, step_no: int, status: str) -> Path:
197	        path = self.reports_dir / f"step_{step_no:03d}_{status.lower()}.png"
198	        try:
199	            self.page.screenshot(path=str(path), full_page=False)
200	        except Exception:
201	            pass
202	        return path
203

1	"""结构化日志 —— 每步打印 locator/action/status/screenshot."""
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	
4	from typing import TYPE_CHECKING
5	
6	from rich.console import Console
7	from rich.markup import escape as _esc
8	
9	if TYPE_CHECKING:
10	    from .executor import StepResult
11	
12	
13	class StepLogger:
14	    def __init__(self) -> None:
15	        self.console = Console()
16	        self._results: list["StepResult"] = []
17	
18	    # ---------- case 层 ----------
19	    def case_start(self, case_name: str, url: str, cache_hits: int, total: int) -> None:
20	        self.console.rule(f"[bold cyan]Case: {case_name}")
21	        self.console.print(f"URL    : [cyan]{url}[/cyan]")
22	        self.console.print(f"Cache  : [green]{cache_hits}/{total} HIT[/green]")
23	        self.console.print("")
24	
25	    def case_end(self, total_ms: int, report_path: str) -> None:
26	        passed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "PASS")
27	        healed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "HEALED")
28	        failed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "FAIL")
29	        color = "green" if failed == 0 else "red"
30	        self.console.rule(style=color)
31	        self.console.print(f"Total: [{color}]{passed} passed[/{color}], [yellow]{healed} healed[/yellow], [red]{failed} failed[/red]   Duration: {total_ms}ms")
32	        self.console.print(f"Report: [cyan]{report_path}[/cyan]")
33	        self.console.rule(style=color)
34	
35	    # ---------- step 层 ----------
36	    def log_translate(self, step_no: int, step_text: str, cache_hit: bool) -> None:
37	        tag = "[green]CACHE HIT[/green]" if cache_hit else "[yellow]LLM CALL[/yellow]"
38	        self.console.print(f"[dim]>> translating step {step_no}[/dim] {tag}  [white]{step_text}[/white]")
39	
40	    def log_step(self, r: "StepResult") -> None:
41	        self._results.append(r)
42	        color = {"PASS": "green", "HEALED": "yellow", "FAIL": "red"}.get(r.status, "white")
43	        mark = {"PASS": "✔", "HEALED": "✚", "FAIL": "✘"}.get(r.status, "?")
44	        self.console.print(f"[bold]{mark} Step {r.step_no:02d}[/bold] [white]{r.raw_text}[/white]")
45	        self.console.print(f"  ├─ Action  : [cyan]{r.action}[/cyan]")
46	        if r.locator_repr:
47	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Locator : [magenta]{_esc(r.locator_repr)}[/magenta]")
48	        if r.code:
49	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Code    : [yellow]{_esc(r.code)}[/yellow]")
50	        if r.resolved_html:
51	            html = r.resolved_html.replace("\n", " ")
52	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Resolved: [dim]{_esc(html)}[/dim]")
53	        heal = f" (healed after {r.heal_attempts} retries)" if r.status == "HEALED" else ""
54	        self.console.print(f"  ├─ Status  : [{color}]{r.status}[/{color}]{heal} ({r.duration_ms}ms)")
55	        if r.error:
56	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Error   : [red]{r.error}[/red]")
57	        if r.screenshot:
58	            self.console.print(f"  └─ Shot    : [dim]{r.screenshot}[/dim]")
59	        else:
60	            self.console.print(f"  └─")
61	
62	    @property
63	    def results(self) -> list["StepResult"]:
64	        return self._results
65
```
</details></tool-use>

先看下现有日志能力的全貌，再设计方案。

---

## 现状分析

**console 输出（已有）**：
- `case_start` → 用例名、URL
- `log_translate` → 步骤原文 + 缓存命中/LLM 调用
- `log_step` → Action、Locator、Code、Resolved HTML、Status、Duration、Error、Screenshot

**日志文件（缺失）**：
- 没有任何文件日志，所有输出只打到了 Rich console

---

## 方案设计

### 目标
1. 控制台输出保持现有的美观格式
2. 同步写入日志文件，方便事后排查
3. 在执行前打印"即将执行"的预告信息，让执行过程更透明

### 改动点

| 文件 | 改动 |
|---|---|
| `core/logger.py` | 增加文件日志支持；新增 `log_step_start` 方法 |
| `run.py` | 初始化 `StepLogger` 时传入日志文件路径 |
| `core/executor.py` | `execute()` 开头调用 `log_step_start` 打印预告 |

### 具体设计

**1. 日志文件**
- 路径：`reports/{safe_case_name}_{timestamp}/run.log`
- 格式：纯文本，每行带时间戳，例如：
  ```
  [2026-05-23 14:30:01] CASE START: 登录成功用例  URL=http://xxx
  [2026-05-23 14:30:01] >> Step 1: 输入用户名 → cache hit
  [2026-05-23 14:30:03]   ▶ EXECUTING: fill → placeholder="用户名" → value="testuser"
  [2026-05-23 14:30:04]   ✔ Step 1 PASS (1200ms)
  ```

**2. `log_step_start`（执行预告）**
- 在 `execute()` 被调用时、action 执行前打印
- 内容：步骤序号 + action 类型 + locator 可读描述 + value（如有）
- console：一行简短预告，用 `▶` 标记
- 文件：带时间戳的纯文本

**3. `StepLogger` 改造**
```python
class StepLogger:
    def __init__(self, log_file: Path | None = None) -> None:
        self.console = Console()
        self._results: list[StepResult] = []
        self._log = open(log_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") if log_file else None

    def _write(self, text: str) -> None:
        """同时写 console 和文件"""
        if self._log:
            ts = datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")
            self._log.write(f"[{ts}] {text}\n")
            self._log.flush()

    def log_step_start(self, step_no: int, raw_text: str, action: str, locator: str | None, value: str | None) -> None:
        """执行前预告"""
        # console: 一行
        target = f"→ {locator}" if locator else ""
        val = f" value={value!r}" if value else ""
        self.console.print(f"  [blue]▶ Step {step_no:02d}[/blue] [{action}]{target}{val}")
        # file
        self._write(f"  ▶ Step {step_no}: {raw_text} | action={action} locator={locator} value={value}")
```

**4. `run.py` 调用点**
- `run_one_case` 中创建 `logger` 时，传入日志文件路径

**5. `executor.py` 调用点**
- `execute()` 开头，`_dispatch` 之前：`self.logger.log_step_start(...)`

### 执行流程示意

```
Case: 登录成功用例          ← case_start
URL: http://xxx

>> translating step 1 [CACHE HIT]  输入用户名    ← log_translate
  ▶ Step 01 [fill] → placeholder="用户名" value='testuser'   ← log_step_start (新增)
  ✔ Step 01 输入用户名
    ├─ Action  : fill
    ├─ Locator : placeholder="用户名"
    ├─ Code    : page.get_by_placeholder("用户名").fill("testuser")
    ├─ Resolved: <input placeholder="用户名" ...>
    ├─ Status  : PASS (1234ms)
    └─
```

---

你觉得这个方案可以吗？有需要调整的地方吗？

42	        self.console.print(f"Report: [cyan]{report_path}[/cyan]")
43	        self.console.rule(style=color)
44	        self._write(f"CASE END  pass={passed} healed={healed} fail={failed}  {total_ms}ms  report={report_path}")
45	
46	    # ---------- step 层 ----------
47	    def log_translate(self, step_no: int, step_text: str, cache_hit: bool) -> None:
48	        tag = "[green]CACHE HIT[/green]" if cache_hit else "[yellow]LLM CALL[/yellow]"
49	        file_tag = "CACHE HIT" if cache_hit else "LLM CALL"
50	        self.console.print(f"[dim]>> translating step {step_no}[/dim] {tag}  [white]{step_text}[/white]")
51	        self._write(f">> Step {step_no}: {step_text} [{file_tag}]")
52	
53	    def log_step_start(self, step_no: int, raw_text: str, action: str, locator: Optional[str], value: Optional[str]) -> None:
54	        """执行前预告：action + locator + value."""
55	        target = f" → {locator}" if locator else ""
56	        val = f" value={value!r}" if value else ""
57	        self.console.print(f"  [blue]▶ Step {step_no:02d}[/blue] [{action}]{target}{val}")
58	        self._write(f"  ▶ Step {step_no}: {raw_text} | action={action} locator={locator} value={value}")
59	
60	    def log_step(self, r: "StepResult") -> None:
61	        self._results.append(r)
62	        color = {"PASS": "green", "HEALED": "yellow", "FAIL": "red"}.get(r.status, "white")
63	        mark = {"PASS": "✔", "HEALED": "✚", "FAIL": "✘"}.get(r.status, "?")
64	        self.console.print(f"[bold]{mark} Step {r.step_no:02d}[/bold] [white]{r.raw_text}[/white]")
65	        self.console.print(f"  ├─ Action  : [cyan]{r.action}[/cyan]")
66	        if r.locator_repr:
67	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Locator : [magenta]{_esc(r.locator_repr)}[/magenta]")
68	        if r.code:
69	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Code    : [yellow]{_esc(r.code)}[/yellow]")
70	        if r.resolved_html:
71	            html = r.resolved_html.replace("\n", " ")
72	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Resolved: [dim]{_esc(html)}[/dim]")
73	        heal = f" (healed after {r.heal_attempts} retries)" if r.status == "HEALED" else ""
74	        self.console.print(f"  ├─ Status  : [{color}]{r.status}[/{color}]{heal} ({r.duration_ms}ms)")
75	        if r.error:
76	            self.console.print(f"  ├─ Error   : [red]{r.error}[/red]")
77	        if r.screenshot:
78	            self.console.print(f"  └─ Shot    : [dim]{r.screenshot}[/dim]")
79	        else:
80	            self.console.print(f"  └─")
81	
82	        # 文件日志
83	        loc = f" locator={r.locator_repr}" if r.locator_repr else ""
84	        self._write(f"  {mark} Step {r.step_no}: {r.raw_text} | {r.status} ({r.duration_ms}ms){loc}")
85	        if r.error:
86	            self._write(f"    Error: {r.error}")
87	
88	    @property
89	    def results(self) -> list["StepResult"]:
90	        return self._results
91	
92	    def close(self) -> None:
93	        if self._log:
94	            self._log.close()
95
```
</details></tool-use>

1	"""脚本缓存层 —— 单步独立落盘."""

4	import json

10	
11	class ScriptCache:
12	    def __init__(self, root: str | Path) -> None:
13	        self.root = Path(root)
14	        self.root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
15	
16	    def case_dir(self, case_name: str) -> Path:
17	        d = self.root / _safe(case_name)
18	        d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
19	        return d
20	
21	    def step_path(self, case_name: str, step_no: int, step_hash: str) -> Path:
22	        return self.case_dir(case_name) / f"step_{step_no:03d}_{step_hash}.json"
23	
24	    def load_step(self, case_name: str, step_no: int, step_hash: str) -> Optional[Action]:
25	        p = self.step_path(case_name, step_no, step_hash)
26	        if not p.exists():
27	            return None
28	        try:
29	            return Action.model_validate_json(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
30	        except Exception:
31	            return None
32	
33	    def save_step(self, case_name: str, step_hash: str, action: Action) -> Path:
34	        p = self.step_path(case_name, action.step_no, step_hash)
35	        p.write_text(action.model_dump_json(indent=2, exclude_none=True), encoding="utf-8")
36	        return p
37	
38	    def save_meta(self, case_name: str, meta: CaseMeta) -> Path:
39	        p = self.case_dir(case_name) / "case.meta.json"
40	        p.write_text(meta.model_dump_json(indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
41	        return p
42	
43	    def export_python_script(self, case_name: str, url: str, actions: list[Action]) -> Path:
44	        """额外导出一份纯 Playwright 脚本, 供人审 / 外部复用."""
45	        lines = [
46	            "# Auto-generated. DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY — edit the YAML and re-generate.",
47	            f"# Case: {case_name}",
48	            "",
49	            "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, expect",
50	            "",
51	            f"def run(page):",
52	            f'    page.goto("{url}")',
53	        ]
54	        for a in actions:
55	            lines.append(f"    # Step {a.step_no}: {a.raw_text}")
56	            lines.append(f"    {render_action(a)}")
57	        lines.extend([
58	            "",
59	            'if __name__ == "__main__":',
60	            "    with sync_playwright() as p:",
61	            "        browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=False)",
62	            "        page = browser.new_page()",
63	            "        run(page)",
64	            "        browser.close()",
65	            "",
66	        ])
67	        p = self.case_dir(case_name) / "playwright_script.py"
68	        p.write_text("\n".join(lines), encoding="utf-8")
69	        return p
70	
71	
72	def _safe(name: str) -> str:
73	    return "".join(c if c.isalnum() or c in "-_." else "_" for c in name)
74	
75	
76	def render_locator(loc: Any) -> str:
77	    s = loc.strategy
78	    if s == "role":
79	        if loc.name:
80	            return f'page.get_by_role("{loc.role}", name="{loc.name}")'
81	        return f'page.get_by_role("{loc.role}")'
82	    if s == "text":
83	        return f'page.get_by_text("{loc.value}", exact={loc.exact})'
84	    if s == "label":
85	        return f'page.get_by_label("{loc.value}")'
86	    if s == "placeholder":
87	        return f'page.get_by_placeholder("{loc.value}")'
88	    if s == "testid":
89	        return f'page.get_by_test_id("{loc.value}")'
90	    if s == "css":
91	        return f'page.locator("{loc.value}")'
92	    if s == "xpath":
93	        return f'page.locator("xpath={loc.value}")'
94	    return "page.locator('body')"
95	
96	
97	def render_action(a: Action) -> str:
98	    loc_expr = render_locator(a.locator) if a.locator else None
99	    act = a.action
100	    if act == "goto":
101	        return f'page.goto("{a.value}")'
102	    if act == "reload":
103	        return "page.reload()"
104	    if act == "go_back":
105	        return "page.go_back()"
106	    if act in {"fill", "type"}:
107	        return f'{loc_expr}.{act}("{a.value}")'
108	    if act == "clear":
109	        return f"{loc_expr}.clear()"
110	    if act == "press":
111	        return f'{loc_expr}.press("{a.value}")'
112	    if act in {"click", "dblclick", "hover", "check", "uncheck", "scroll_into_view"}:
113	        method = "scroll_into_view_if_needed" if act == "scroll_into_view" else act
114	        return f"{loc_expr}.{method}()"
115	    if act == "select_option":
116	        return f'{loc_expr}.select_option("{a.value}")'
117	    if act == "upload_file":
118	        return f'{loc_expr}.set_input_files("{a.value}")'
119	    if act == "wait_for":
120	        return f'{loc_expr}.wait_for(state="{a.state or "visible"}")'
121	    if act == "wait_for_url":
122	        return f'page.wait_for_url("{a.value}")'
123	    if act == "wait_timeout":
124	        return f"page.wait_for_timeout({a.value})"
125	    if act == "screenshot":
126	        return "page.screenshot()"
127	    if act == "assert" and a.assertion:
128	        t = a.assertion.type
129	        exp = a.assertion.expected
130	        if t == "visible":         return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_visible()"
131	        if t == "hidden":          return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_hidden()"
132	        if t == "enabled":         return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_enabled()"
133	        if t == "disabled":        return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_disabled()"
134	        if t == "checked":         return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_be_checked()"
135	        if t == "contains_text":   return f'expect({loc_expr}).to_contain_text("{exp}")'
136	        if t == "has_text":        return f'expect({loc_expr}).to_have_text("{exp}")'
137	        if t == "has_value":       return f'expect({loc_expr}).to_have_value("{exp}")'
138	        if t == "has_count":       return f"expect({loc_expr}).to_have_count({exp})"
139	        if t == "url_matches":     return f'expect(page).to_have_url("{exp}")'
140	    return "# unsupported action"
141

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-05-23 06:46:47Z)**_

根据你的操作步骤，框架生成的 Playwright 脚本大概长这样：

```python
# Auto-generated. DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY — edit the YAML and re-generate.
# Case: 登录场景

from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright, expect

def run(page):
    page.goto("http://localhost:4173/")  # 使用配置中的 base_url

    # Step 1: 打开登录页（使用配置中的 base_url）
    # 如果 base_url 已经是登录页，可能不需要额外操作
    # 否则 LLM 可能生成:
    page.goto("http://localhost:4173/login")

    # Step 2: 在'请输入手机号'输入框输入：'13800000000'
    page.get_by_placeholder("请输入手机号").fill("13800000000")

    # Step 3: 在'请输入密码'输入框输入：'123456'
    page.get_by_placeholder("请输入密码").fill("123456")

    # Step 4: 点击"登录"按钮
    page.get_by_role("button", name="登录").click()

    # Step 5~6: 预期结果断言
    # LLM 会根据页面实际 DOM 生成断言
    expect(page).to_have_url("http://localhost:4173/home")  # 进入首页
    expect(page.get_by_text("登录失败")).to_be_hidden()     # 不出现登录失败提示
```

**生成过程**：

1. 你把用例写成 YAML（放在 `natural_cases/` 下），`steps` 里写自然语言
2. 运行时，框架在每一步执行前抓取**当前页面 DOM 摘要**喂给 LLM
3. LLM 做"选择题"——从 7 种 locator 策略（role/text/placeholder/...）和 ~15 种 action 中选最匹配的
4. 最终通过 `render_action()` 导出上面这份可读脚本，存在 `script_cache/{用例名}/playwright_script.py`

**关键点**：locator 不是静态写死的，而是 LLM 看着**实时页面 DOM** 选出来的。比如 "请输入手机号" 可能匹配到：
- `page.get_by_placeholder("请输入手机号")`（首选）
- `page.get_by_label("请输入手机号")`（备选）
- `page.locator("input[placeholder='请输入手机号']")`（兜底）

实际生成的脚本取决于页面真实的 HTML 结构。

1	"""抽取页面可见交互元素的精简快照, 喂给 LLM 提升定位准确率."""
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	
4	from typing import Any
5	
6	# 在浏览器侧执行的 JS, 返回 [{tag, role, name, id, testid, text, placeholder, type, scope}]
7	# scope 是最近的有意义祖先 (id / role=tabpanel|dialog|menu / aria-labelledby), 帮助 LLM 区分同名元素
8	_SNAPSHOT_JS = r"""
9	() => {
10	  // 基础元素 + 组件容器 (.el-select, .ant-select 等)
11	  const SEL = 'a,button,input,textarea,select,[role],[data-testid]';
12	  const CONTAINER_SEL = '.el-select, .ant-select, [aria-haspopup]';
13	  const items = [];
14	  const seen = new Set();
15	
16	  function findScope(el) {
17	    let cur = el.parentElement;
18	    while (cur && cur !== document.body) {
19	      if (cur.id && !cur.id.startsWith('el-id-')) return '#' + cur.id;
20	      const role = cur.getAttribute('role');
21	      if (role && ['tabpanel','dialog','menu','listbox','navigation','region','form'].includes(role)) {
22	        const id = cur.id || '';
23	        const label = cur.getAttribute('aria-label') || cur.getAttribute('aria-labelledby') || '';
24	        return `[role=${role}${id ? ' id=' + id : ''}${label ? ' aria-label="' + label + '"' : ''}]`;
25	      }
26	      cur = cur.parentElement;
27	    }
28	    return '';
29	  }
30	
31	  // 抓取基础元素
32	  document.querySelectorAll(SEL).forEach(el => {
33	    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
34	    if (rect.width === 0 || rect.height === 0) return;
35	    const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
36	    if (style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.display === 'none') return;
37	    const item = {
38	      tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
39	      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
40	      name: el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.getAttribute('name') || '',
41	      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
42	      _id: el.id || '',
43	      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
44	      text: (el.innerText || el.value || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
45	      placeholder: el.getAttribute('placeholder') || '',
46	      type: el.getAttribute('type') || '',
47	      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
48	      scope: findScope(el),
49	    };
50	    const key = JSON.stringify(item);
51	    if (seen.has(key)) return;
52	    seen.add(key);
53	    items.push(item);
54	  });
55	
56	  // 抓取组件容器
57	  document.querySelectorAll(CONTAINER_SEL).forEach(el => {
58	    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
59	    if (rect.width === 0 || rect.height === 0) return;
60	    // 获取容器内第一个可见 input 的 id
61	    let innerId = '';
62	    const innerInput = el.querySelector('input');
63	    if (innerInput) innerId = innerInput.id || '';
64	    const item = {
65	      tag: 'container',
66	      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
67	      name: '',
68	      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
69	      _id: el.id || '',
70	      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
71	      text: (el.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
72	      placeholder: '',
73	      type: '',
74	      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
75	      scope: findScope(el),
76	      inner_id: innerId,
77	    };
78	    const key = 'container:' + JSON.stringify(item);
79	    if (seen.has(key)) return;
80	    seen.add(key);
81	    items.push(item);
82	  });
83	
84	  return items.slice(0, 80);
85	}
86	"""
87	
88	
89	def snapshot(page: Any, limit: int = 80) -> str:
90	    """返回紧凑文本, 含 scope (父容器) 信息, 便于 LLM 区分同名元素."""
91	    try:
92	        items = page.evaluate(_SNAPSHOT_JS) or []
93	    except Exception:
94	        return ""
95	    lines = []
96	    for it in items[:limit]:
97	        is_container = it.get("tag") == "container"
98	        if is_container:
99	            # 容器: 只显示类型和 aria-haspopup, 不暴露内部动态 id
100	            parts = [f"container(.el-select)"]
101	            if it.get("haspopup"):
102	                parts.append(f"haspopup={it['haspopup']}")
103	            head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
104	        else:
105	            parts = [f"<{it['tag']}"]
106	            # 只显示稳定 id (非 el-id- 前缀), 隐藏动态 id 避免 LLM 偷懒用 #el-id-xxx
107	            stable_id = it.get("id") or ""
108	            if stable_id:
109	                parts.append(f'id="{stable_id}"')
110	            for k in ("role", "name", "testid", "type", "placeholder", "haspopup"):
111	                v = it.get(k)
112	                if v:
113	                    parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
114	            head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
115	        text = it.get("text") or ""
116	        scope = it.get("scope") or ""
117	        suffix = f"  [scope={scope}]" if scope else ""
118	        lines.append(f"{head} {text}{suffix}".rstrip())
119	    return "\n".join(lines)
120
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-05-23 06:47:32Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to know what the DOM snapshot looks like. I have the code, so I can explain it with a concrete example.
</details></think>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-05-23 06:47:41Z)**_

DOM 摘要是通过 `page.evaluate()` 注入一段 JS，从页面中提取**可见交互元素**的精简文本表示。输出格式大致如下：

```
<button role="button" name="登录"> 登录
<input type="text" placeholder="请输入手机号">  [scope=#pane-login]
<input type="password" placeholder="请输入密码">  [scope=#pane-login]
<button type="submit"> 登录  [scope=#pane-login]
<a> 忘记密码
<div role="tab" name="登录"> 登录
<div role="tab" name="验证码登录"> 验证码登录
```

具体来说：

**抓取范围**：
- `a, button, input, textarea, select, [role], [data-testid]` —— 所有交互元素
- `.el-select, .ant-select, [aria-haspopup]` —— 组件容器（下拉框等）
- 最多 80 个元素，过滤掉 `width/height=0` 和 `display:none/visibility:hidden` 的隐藏元素

**每个元素提取**：
```
<{tag} id="xxx" role="xxx" name="xxx" placeholder="xxx" type="xxx">  可见文本  [scope=父容器]
```

- 只显示**稳定的 id**（过滤掉 `el-id-` 前缀的动态 id）
- 通过 `scope` 标注最近的有意义祖先（如 `#pane-login`、`role=dialog`），帮助 LLM 区分同名元素
- 文本截断到 40 字符

**在登录页的实际效果示例**：
```
<a> 登录
<div role="tab" name="登录"> 登录  [scope=#pane-login]
<div role="tab" name="验证码登录"> 验证码登录  [scope=#pane-login]
<input id="userPhone" type="text" placeholder="请输入手机号">  [scope=#pane-login]
<input type="text" placeholder="请输入密码">  [scope=#pane-login]
<button type="button"> 登录  [scope=#pane-login]
<a> 注册账号
```

LLM 收到的就是这样的纯文本，然后从 schema 定义的 7 种 locator 策略中"做选择题"，选出最合适的定位方式。

_**User (2026-05-23 06:58:03Z)**_

DOM摘要是怎么获取的

---

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-05-23 06:58:08Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to understand how the DOM snapshot is obtained. I've already read the code, so I just need to explain the mechanism.
</details></think>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-05-23 06:58:14Z)**_

DOM 摘要的获取流程：

**1. `dom_snapshot.py` 里内置了一段 JS 字符串**（`_SNAPSHOT_JS`）

**2. `snapshot(page)` 函数调用 `page.evaluate(_SNAPSHOT_JS)`**

这就是全部了——直接在 Playwright 的浏览器上下文中执行这段 JS，返回一个 JSON 数组。

**3. JS 的逻辑**：

```
document.querySelectorAll(SEL)  →  遍历所有交互元素
  ↓
过滤：rect.width === 0 || display === none || visibility === hidden  →  跳过
  ↓
对每个可见元素收集：{tag, role, name, placeholder, text, id, type, scope, ...}
  ↓
对容器元素额外处理：找内部 input 的 id
  ↓
去重（JSON key set）
  ↓
.slice(0, 80)  →  最多返回 80 个
  ↓
Python 侧把 JSON 数组格式化成紧凑文本
  ↓
返回给 LLM
```

**核心就是 `page.evaluate()`**，在浏览器里跑自定义 JS，不依赖 Playwright 内置的 `snapshot` 或 `aria` 定位器，而是自己写了一套精简的提取逻辑，专门针对 Element Plus / Ant Design 等 UI 框架做了适配（比如 `.el-select` 容器、`el-id-` 前缀的动态 id 过滤等）。

---

_**User (2026-05-23 07:00:13Z)**_

为啥不依赖Playwright 内置的 snapshot

---

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-05-23 07:00:18Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is asking why the framework doesn't use Playwright's built-in snapshot functionality. Playwright doesn't actually have a built-in "snapshot" API in the same way that accessibility tools or some other testing frameworks do. Let me think about what they might be referring to:

1. Playwright's `page.accessibility.snapshot()` - This returns an accessibility tree
2. Playwright's `locator.evaluate()` or DOM inspection methods
3. Playwright's built-in test snapshots (visual regression)

The most likely candidate is `page.accessibility.snapshot()`. Let me explain why the custom approach was chosen over Playwright's built-in accessibility snapshot, and also consider other "built-in" snapshot options.
</details></think>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-05-23 07:00:25Z)**_

Playwright 没有原生的 "DOM snapshot" API，最接近的是 `page.accessibility.snapshot()`，但它有几个问题：

**1. 信息过载**
`accessibility.snapshot()` 返回整棵完整的无障碍树（ATree），包含大量不可见元素、装饰性节点、布局元素。一个简单页面可能返回几千个节点，远超 LLM 上下文窗口的有效范围。自定义 JS 只抓 80 个交互元素，控制在 ~3-5KB。

**2. 无法过滤隐藏元素**
无障碍树会包含一些在 DOM 中但视觉上不可见的元素（比如 `role="presentation"` 的节点），需要后处理过滤。自定义 JS 在浏览器端直接用 `getBoundingClientRect()` + `getComputedStyle()` 一步到位。

**3. 缺少 `scope` 信息**
框架需要"最近的有意义祖先容器"来帮 LLM 区分同名元素（比如两个页面里都有"登录"按钮）。无障碍树是扁平的树形结构，没有这个语义化容器概念。

**4. 对 UI 组件库不友好**
Element Plus / Ant Design 的组件（如 `.el-select`、`el-id-xxx`）在无障碍树中会展开成一堆零散的底层节点，丢失了"这是一个下拉框"的语义。自定义 JS 通过 `CONTAINER_SEL` 单独抓取组件容器，保留高层语义。

**5. 可控性强**
自定义 JS 可以精准控制：
- 只暴露稳定 id（过滤动态 id）
- 文本截断到 40 字符
- 容器元素特殊标记 `container(.el-select)`
- 去重逻辑可定制

如果用 `accessibility.snapshot()`，反而要多一层"清洗 → 提取 → 格式化"的逻辑，不如直接一步到位。

---

_**User (2026-05-23 07:00:52Z)**_

提取DOM摘要一定正确吗

---

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-05-23 07:00:54Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is asking about the correctness/reliability of the DOM snapshot extraction. This is a good question about the limitations of the custom JS snapshot approach.
</details></think>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-05-23 07:01:05Z)**_

不一定，有不少边界情况可能遗漏或出错：

**1. 选择器覆盖不全**
```js
const SEL = 'a,button,input,textarea,select,[role],[data-testid]';
```
会漏掉：
- `div` / `span` 绑定了 `onclick` 的自定义可点击区域
- 没有 `[role]` 属性的组件容器（比如自定义 tooltip、弹窗遮罩）
- `iframe` 内的元素（`querySelectorAll` 不会跨 frame）
- `shadow DOM` 内的元素

**2. 可见性判断不完美**
```js
if (rect.width === 0 || rect.height === 0) return;
if (style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.display === 'none') return;
```
- 漏了 `opacity: 0`、`clip: rect(0,0,0,0)`、`pointer-events: none` 等"视觉不可见但 DOM 存在"的情况
- 被其他元素**完全遮挡**的元素无法检测到——它宽高正常、display 正常，但用户根本点不到，框架可能会把这样的元素喂给 LLM
- `z-index` 层级关系完全没考虑

**3. 滚动区域遗漏**
`getBoundingClientRect()` 对滚动区域内的元素在视口外时，rect 宽高仍然是正确的（不像 `offsetWidth`），所以滚动区域**外的不可见元素也会被包括进来**，这对 LLM 翻译来说是噪声——它不知道这个元素其实在页面底部、当前看不到。

**4. 动态内容时机问题**
快照是"一瞬间"拍的：
- 下拉菜单、弹窗、tooltip 等**还没打开的元素**不在 DOM 里，拿不到
- 懒加载的组件如果还没滚动到，可能还没渲染

**5. 去重可能误杀**
```js
const key = JSON.stringify(item);
```
两个不同的元素如果 tag、role、placeholder、text、scope 全一样（比如两个相同占位符的输入框在不同 tab 里但 scope 也相同），会被去重过滤掉一个。

**6. `findScope()` 的局限性**
向上找祖先只认 `id`（排除 `el-id-`）和几个特定 role（`tabpanel/dialog/menu/listbox/navigation/region/form`），如果页面用 `<div class="login-box">` 这种纯 class 做容器，scope 就是空的。

---

**实际影响**：大部分情况下够用——因为 LLM 有容错能力，而且框架有 self-heal 机制兜底。但如果页面结构复杂（嵌套 iframe、大量自定义组件、滚动分页），摘要质量会明显下降，可能导致 LLM 选错元素。

---

```md
# 提升 DOM 摘要准确性

## Context

当前 `core/dom_snapshot.py` 通过 `page.evaluate()` 注入 JS 获取可见交互元素的精简快照。存在以下已知问题：
1. 选择器覆盖不全 — 漏掉绑定 onclick 的 div/span、iframe 内元素、无 role 的组件容器
2. 可见性判断不完整 — 漏了 opacity:0、pointer-events:none、被完全遮挡的情况
3. 去重可能误杀 — 完全相同的两个元素会过滤掉一个
4. scope 查找局限性 — 只认 id 和少数 role，纯 class 容器被遗漏
5. 没有 viewport 内位置信息 — LLM 不知道元素当前是否在可视区域

## 改进方案

### 1. 扩展选择器覆盖范围

修改 `_SNAPSHOT_JS` 中的 `SEL`，增加常见可交互容器元素：
\```js
const SEL = 'a,button,input,textarea,select,[role],[data-testid],[onclick],[tabindex="0"],[tabindex="-1"],div[role=button],span[role=button],label';
\```
- 增加 `[onclick]` 捕获内联事件绑定的元素
- 增加 `[tabindex]` 捕获可聚焦元素
- 增加 `label` 捕获表单标签

### 2. 完善可见性判断

在 JS 中增加检查：
\```js
// opacity / pointer-events
if (style.opacity === '0' || style.pointerEvents === 'none') return;
// 被完全遮挡的检查（简单版）
const elemAtPoint = document.elementFromPoint(rect.x + rect.width/2, rect.y + rect.height/2);
if (elemAtPoint && !el.contains(elemAtPoint) && !elemAtPoint.contains(el)) return;
\```

### 3. 去重改为基于 id 或 unique key

当前用全字段 JSON 去重容易误杀。改为优先用稳定 id，无 id 时保留 (tag + role + placeholder + text + scope) 的 hash，但允许完全重复的元素出现最多 3 次：
\```js
if (!seen.has(key)) { seen.add(key); seenCount.set(key, 0); }
if (seenCount.get(key) >= 3) return;
seenCount.set(key, seenCount.get(key) + 1);
item._idx = seenCount.get(key); // 标记第几个相同元素
\```

### 4. 增强 scope 查找

scope 查找增加 class 匹配：
\```js
if (cur.className && typeof cur.className === 'string') {
  const classes = cur.className.trim().split(/\s+/).slice(0, 2);
  if (classes.some(c => c.length > 2)) return '.' + classes.join('.');
}
\```

### 5. 增加 viewport 位置信息

在返回的 item 中增加 `in_viewport` 标记：
\```js
in_viewport: rect.top >= 0 && rect.left >= 0 &&
             rect.bottom <= (window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight) &&
             rect.right <= (window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth),
\```
在 Python 格式化输出时标注：
\```
<input placeholder="xxx"> 文本  [scope=xxx] (in viewport)
\```

## 修改文件

- `core/dom_snapshot.py` — 修改 `_SNAPSHOT_JS` 和 `snapshot()` 函数

## 验证方式

1. 运行一个已知的登录用例，对比改进前后的 DOM 摘要输出
2. 检查是否遗漏了之前能找到的元素
3. 检查是否新增了之前找不到的关键元素
4. 观察 LLM 翻译准确率是否有提升（通过 cache miss 时 LLM 首次翻译成功率判断）

```

## Approved Plan:
# 提升 DOM 摘要准确性

## Context

当前 `core/dom_snapshot.py` 通过 `page.evaluate()` 注入 JS 获取可见交互元素的精简快照。存在以下已知问题：
1. 选择器覆盖不全 — 漏掉绑定 onclick 的 div/span、iframe 内元素、无 role 的组件容器
2. 可见性判断不完整 — 漏了 opacity:0、pointer-events:none、被完全遮挡的情况
3. 去重可能误杀 — 完全相同的两个元素会过滤掉一个
4. scope 查找局限性 — 只认 id 和少数 role，纯 class 容器被遗漏
5. 没有 viewport 内位置信息 — LLM 不知道元素当前是否在可视区域

## 改进方案

### 1. 扩展选择器覆盖范围

修改 `_SNAPSHOT_JS` 中的 `SEL`，增加常见可交互容器元素：
```js
const SEL = 'a,button,input,textarea,select,[role],[data-testid],[onclick],[tabindex="0"],[tabindex="-1"],div[role=button],span[role=button],label';
```
- 增加 `[onclick]` 捕获内联事件绑定的元素
- 增加 `[tabindex]` 捕获可聚焦元素
- 增加 `label` 捕获表单标签

### 2. 完善可见性判断

在 JS 中增加检查：
```js
// opacity / pointer-events
if (style.opacity === '0' || style.pointerEvents === 'none') return;
// 被完全遮挡的检查（简单版）
const elemAtPoint = document.elementFromPoint(rect.x + rect.width/2, rect.y + rect.height/2);
if (elemAtPoint && !el.contains(elemAtPoint) && !elemAtPoint.contains(el)) return;
```

### 3. 去重改为基于 id 或 unique key

当前用全字段 JSON 去重容易误杀。改为优先用稳定 id，无 id 时保留 (tag + role + placeholder + text + scope) 的 hash，但允许完全重复的元素出现最多 3 次：
```js
if (!seen.has(key)) { seen.add(key); seenCount.set(key, 0); }
if (seenCount.get(key) >= 3) return;
seenCount.set(key, seenCount.get(key) + 1);
item._idx = seenCount.get(key); // 标记第几个相同元素
```

### 4. 增强 scope 查找

scope 查找增加 class 匹配：
```js
if (cur.className && typeof cur.className === 'string') {
  const classes = cur.className.trim().split(/\s+/).slice(0, 2);
  if (classes.some(c => c.length > 2)) return '.' + classes.join('.');
}
```

### 5. 增加 viewport 位置信息

在返回的 item 中增加 `in_viewport` 标记：
```js
in_viewport: rect.top >= 0 && rect.left >= 0 &&
             rect.bottom <= (window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight) &&
             rect.right <= (window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth),
```
在 Python 格式化输出时标注：
```
<input placeholder="xxx"> 文本  [scope=xxx] (in viewport)
```

## 修改文件

- `core/dom_snapshot.py` — 修改 `_SNAPSHOT_JS` 和 `snapshot()` 函数

## 验证方式

1. 运行一个已知的登录用例，对比改进前后的 DOM 摘要输出
2. 检查是否遗漏了之前能找到的元素
3. 检查是否新增了之前找不到的关键元素
4. 观察 LLM 翻译准确率是否有提升（通过 cache miss 时 LLM 首次翻译成功率判断）
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./core/dom_snapshot.py`

```text
1	"""抽取页面可见交互元素的精简快照, 喂给 LLM 提升定位准确率."""
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	
4	from typing import Any
5	
6	# 在浏览器侧执行的 JS, 返回 [{tag, role, name, id, testid, text, placeholder, type, scope}]
7	# scope 是最近的有意义祖先 (id / role=tabpanel|dialog|menu / class), 帮助 LLM 区分同名元素
8	_SNAPSHOT_JS = r"""
9	() => {
10	  // 扩展选择器: 覆盖内联事件绑定、可聚焦元素、表单标签、常见自定义可交互元素
11	  const SEL = [
12	    'a,button,input,textarea,select,[role],[data-testid]',
13	    '[onclick]',
14	    '[tabindex="0"],[tabindex="-1"]',
15	    'label',
16	    'summary',
17	  ].join(',');
18	  const CONTAINER_SEL = '.el-select, .ant-select, [aria-haspopup]';
19	  const items = [];
20	  const seen = new Map();  // key → count, 允许重复元素最多出现 3 次
21	
22	  function findScope(el) {
23	    let cur = el.parentElement;
24	    while (cur && cur !== document.body) {
25	      // 稳定 id
26	      if (cur.id && !cur.id.startsWith('el-id-')) return '#' + cur.id;
27	      // 有意义的 role 容器
28	      const role = cur.getAttribute('role');
29	      if (role && ['tabpanel','dialog','menu','listbox','navigation','region','form'].includes(role)) {
30	        const id = cur.id || '';
31	        const label = cur.getAttribute('aria-label') || cur.getAttribute('aria-labelledby') || '';
32	        return `[role=${role}${id ? ' id=' + id : ''}${label ? ' aria-label="' + label + '"' : ''}]`;
33	      }
34	      // 有语义的 class 容器 (取前两个有意义的 class)
35	      if (cur.className && typeof cur.className === 'string') {
36	        const classes = cur.className.trim().split(/\s+/).filter(c => c.length > 2);
37	        if (classes.length > 0) {
38	          return '.' + classes.slice(0, 2).join('.');
39	        }
40	      }
41	      cur = cur.parentElement;
42	    }
43	    return '';
44	  }
45	
46	  function isVisible(el) {
47	    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
48	    if (rect.width === 0 || rect.height === 0) return false;
49	    const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);
50	    if (style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.display === 'none') return false;
51	    if (style.opacity === '0') return false;
52	    if (style.pointerEvents === 'none') return false;
53	    // 检查是否被完全遮挡 (取元素中心点)
54	    const cx = rect.x + rect.width / 2;
55	    const cy = rect.y + rect.height / 2;
56	    const top = document.elementFromPoint(cx, cy);
57	    if (top && top !== el && !el.contains(top)) {
58	      // 中心点被其他不相关元素覆盖
59	      return false;
60	    }
61	    return true;
62	  }
63	
64	  function isInViewport(el) {
65	    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
66	    const vh = window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight;
67	    const vw = window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth;
68	    return rect.top >= 0 && rect.left >= 0 && rect.bottom <= vh && rect.right <= vw;
69	  }
70	
71	  // 抓取基础元素
72	  document.querySelectorAll(SEL).forEach(el => {
73	    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
74	    const item = {
75	      tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
76	      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
77	      name: el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.getAttribute('name') || '',
78	      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
79	      _id: el.id || '',
80	      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
81	      text: (el.innerText || el.value || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
82	      placeholder: el.getAttribute('placeholder') || '',
83	      type: el.getAttribute('type') || '',
84	      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
85	      scope: findScope(el),
86	      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
87	    };
88	    const key = JSON.stringify({
89	      tag: item.tag, role: item.role, placeholder: item.placeholder,
90	      text: item.text, scope: item.scope, id: item.id,
91	    });
92	    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
93	    if (count >= 3) return;
94	    seen.set(key, count + 1);
95	    item._idx = count;
96	    items.push(item);
97	  });
98	
99	  // 抓取组件容器
100	  document.querySelectorAll(CONTAINER_SEL).forEach(el => {
101	    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
102	    let innerId = '';
103	    const innerInput = el.querySelector('input');
104	    if (innerInput) innerId = innerInput.id || '';
105	    const item = {
106	      tag: 'container',
107	      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
108	      name: '',
109	      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
110	      _id: el.id || '',
111	      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
112	      text: (el.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
113	      placeholder: '',
114	      type: '',
115	      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
116	      scope: findScope(el),
117	      inner_id: innerId,
118	      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
119	    };
120	    const key = 'container:' + JSON.stringify({tag: 'container', text: item.text, scope: item.scope});
121	    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
122	    if (count >= 3) return;
123	    seen.set(key, count + 1);
124	    item._idx = count;
125	    items.push(item);
126	  });
127	
128	  return items.slice(0, 80);
129	}
130	"""
131	
132	
133	def snapshot(page: Any, limit: int = 80) -> str:
134	    """返回紧凑文本, 含 scope (父容器) + viewport 信息, 便于 LLM 区分同名元素."""
135	    try:
136	        items = page.evaluate(_SNAPSHOT_JS) or []
137	    except Exception:
138	        return ""
139	    lines = []
140	    for it in items[:limit]:
141	        is_container = it.get("tag") == "container"
142	        if is_container:
143	            parts = [f"container(.el-select)"]
144	            if it.get("haspopup"):
145	                parts.append(f"haspopup={it['haspopup']}")
146	            head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
147	        else:
148	            parts = [f"<{it['tag']}"]
149	            stable_id = it.get("id") or ""
150	            if stable_id:
151	                parts.append(f'id="{stable_id}"')
152	            for k in ("role", "name", "testid", "type", "placeholder", "haspopup"):
153	                v = it.get(k)
154	                if v:
155	                    parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
156	            # 同名元素序号
157	            idx = it.get("_idx", 0)
158	            if idx > 0:
159	                parts.append(f"#{idx}")
160	            head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
161	        text = it.get("text") or ""
162	        scope = it.get("scope") or ""
163	        suffix_parts = []
164	        if scope:
165	            suffix_parts.append(f"[scope={scope}]")
166	        # 只标注不在 viewport 内的元素 (LLM 需要知道它当前看不到)
167	        if not it.get("in_viewport", True):
168	            suffix_parts.append("[off-screen]")
169	        suffix = " " + " ".join(suffix_parts) if suffix_parts else ""
170	        lines.append(f"{head} {text}{suffix}".rstrip())
171	    return "\n".join(lines)
172
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (zyb-fast 2026-05-23 07:10:02Z)**_

修改完成，`dom_snapshot.py` 的 5 项改进：

| 改进 | 说明 |
|---|---|
| **扩展选择器** | 增加 `[onclick]`、`[tabindex]`、`label`、`summary`，覆盖内联事件绑定和可聚焦元素 |
| **完善可见性** | 增加 `opacity:0`、`pointer-events:none` 过滤；`elementFromPoint()` 检查被遮挡的元素 |
| **去重改进** | `Set` → `Map`，基于关键特征去重，允许相同元素最多出现 3 次，多余的标注 `#1`、`#2` |
| **增强 scope** | 查找增加有语义的 class 容器（取前两个长度 >2 的 class），之前纯 class 包裹的元素 scope 为空 |
| **viewport 标注** | 增加 `in_viewport` 检测，不在可视范围内的元素标注 `[off-screen]`，LLM 可以据此判断是否需要先滚动 |

改进后的摘要示例：
```
<input id="userPhone" placeholder="请输入手机号">  [scope=#pane-login]
<input placeholder="请输入密码">  [scope=#pane-login]
<button> 登录  [scope=#pane-login]
<div class="login-agreement"> 同意用户协议  [scope=.login-form] (off-screen)
```

1	"""把 Locator JSON 解析成 Playwright Locator 对象."""
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	
4	from typing import Any
5	
6	from .schema import Locator
7	
8	
9	def resolve_locator(page: Any, loc: Locator):
10	    """返回 Playwright Locator. 失败时按 fallback 依次重试."""
11	    candidates = [loc] + list(loc.fallback or [])
12	    last_err: Exception | None = None
13	    for cand in candidates:
14	        try:
15	            return _single(page, cand)
16	        except Exception as e:
17	            last_err = e
18	            continue
19	    raise RuntimeError(f"无法解析 locator: {loc}, last error: {last_err}")
20	
21	
22	def _single(page: Any, loc: Locator):
23	    s = loc.strategy
24	    if s == "role":
25	        kwargs = {}
26	        if loc.name:
27	            kwargs["name"] = loc.name
28	        l = page.get_by_role(loc.role, **kwargs)
29	    elif s == "text":
30	        l = page.get_by_text(loc.value, exact=loc.exact)
31	    elif s == "label":
32	        l = page.get_by_label(loc.value)
33	    elif s == "placeholder":
34	        l = page.get_by_placeholder(loc.value)
35	    elif s == "testid":
36	        l = page.get_by_test_id(loc.value)
37	    elif s == "css":
38	        l = page.locator(loc.value)
39	    elif s == "xpath":
40	        l = page.locator(f"xpath={loc.value}")
41	    else:
42	        raise ValueError(f"未知 locator strategy: {s}")
43	    if loc.nth is not None:
44	        l = l.nth(loc.nth)
45	    return l
46	
47	
48	def locator_repr(loc: Locator) -> str:
49	    """日志友好的 locator 字符串."""
50	    s = loc.strategy
51	    if s == "role":
52	        return f'role={loc.role}' + (f'[name="{loc.name}"]' if loc.name else "")
53	    return f"{s}={loc.value}"
54
```

```text
1	"""自愈: 步骤执行失败时, 带着当前 DOM 让 LLM 重新翻译, 然后重试.
2	
3	策略:
4	  - 仅对"定位/动作类异常"触发(超时/未找到等), 不对断言失败触发.
5	  - 单步最多 max_retries 次, 成功后回写缓存.
6	"""
7	from __future__ import annotations
8	
9	from dataclasses import dataclass
10	from typing import Any, Callable, Optional
11	
12	from .dom_snapshot import snapshot
13	from .parser import NaturalCase
14	from .schema import Action
15	from .translator import Translator
16	
17	
18	# 触发自愈的异常类型 (Playwright 抛出的多为 TimeoutError / Error)
19	def _is_locator_failure(err: BaseException) -> bool:
20	    msg = str(err).lower()
21	    keywords = ("timeout", "no element", "not found", "waiting for", "strict mode violation", "locator")
22	    return any(k in msg for k in keywords)
23	
24	
25	@dataclass
26	class HealResult:
27	    healed: bool
28	    attempts: int
29	    new_action: Optional[Action] = None
30	    final_error: Optional[str] = None
31	
32	
33	class SelfHealer:
34	    def __init__(
35	        self,
36	        translator: Translator,
37	        page: Any,
38	        case: NaturalCase,
39	        max_retries: int = 2,
40	    ) -> None:
41	        self.translator = translator
42	        self.page = page
43	        self.case = case
44	        self.max_retries = max_retries
45	
46	    def heal(
47	        self,
48	        action: Action,
49	        first_error: str,
50	        execute_fn: Callable[[Action], tuple[bool, Optional[str]]],
51	    ) -> HealResult:
52	        """尝试自愈. execute_fn(action) -> (ok, err).
53	
54	        关键: 翻译时不立即写缓存; 只在新 action 真的跑通后才 commit, 避免污染.
55	        """
56	        last_err = first_error
57	        for attempt in range(1, self.max_retries + 1):
58	            page_hint = snapshot(self.page)
59	            try:
60	                new_action, _ = self.translator.translate_step(
61	                    self.case,
62	                    action.step_no,
63	                    action.raw_text,
64	                    page_hint=page_hint,
65	                    force_llm=True,
66	                    save_to_cache=False,  # ★ 先不写缓存, 等验证通过再写
67	                )
68	            except Exception as e:
69	                last_err = f"heal translate failed: {e}"
70	                continue
71	
72	            ok, err = execute_fn(new_action)
73	            if ok:
74	                # ★ 跑通了, 才把新版本写入缓存
75	                self.translator.commit_to_cache(self.case, action.raw_text, new_action)
76	                return HealResult(healed=True, attempts=attempt, new_action=new_action)
77	            last_err = err or "unknown"
78	
79	        return HealResult(healed=False, attempts=self.max_retries, final_error=last_err)
80	
81	
82	def is_healable(err_msg: str) -> bool:
83	    return _is_locator_failure(Exception(err_msg))
84
```
</details></tool-use>

1	"""Action Dispatcher —— 把 Action JSON 翻译成真实的 Playwright 调用."""
2	from __future__ import annotations
3	
4	import time
5	from dataclasses import dataclass
6	from pathlib import Path
7	from typing import Any, Optional
8	
9	from playwright.sync_api import expect
10	
11	from typing import Callable
12	
13	from .cache import render_action
14	from .locator_resolver import locator_repr, resolve_locator
15	from .logger import StepLogger

18	
19	@dataclass
20	class StepResult:
21	    step_no: int
22	    raw_text: str
23	    action: str
24	    locator_repr: Optional[str]
25	    status: str           # PASS | FAIL | HEALED
26	    duration_ms: int
27	    error: Optional[str] = None
28	    screenshot: Optional[str] = None
29	    resolved_html: Optional[str] = None
30	    heal_attempts: int = 0

33	
34	class Executor:
35	    def __init__(
36	        self,
37	        page: Any,
38	        reports_dir: Path,
39	        logger: StepLogger,
40	        screenshot_every: bool = True,
41	        screenshot_on_failure: bool = True,
42	        default_timeout_ms: int = 10000,
43	        healer: Optional[Any] = None,  # SelfHealer 实例, 可选
44	        step_wait_before_ms: int = 0,  # 每步执行前等待毫秒数
45	    ) -> None:
46	        self.page = page
47	        self.reports_dir = reports_dir
48	        self.reports_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
49	        self.logger = logger
50	        self.shot_every = screenshot_every
51	        self.shot_fail = screenshot_on_failure
52	        self.default_timeout = default_timeout_ms
53	        self.healer = healer
54	        self.step_wait_before_ms = step_wait_before_ms
55	
56	    # ---------- public ----------
57	    def execute(self, action: Action) -> StepResult:
58	        from .self_heal import is_healable
59	
60	        t0 = time.time()
61	        loc_repr = locator_repr(action.locator) if action.locator else None
62	        resolved_html = None
63	        status, err = "PASS", None
64	        heal_attempts = 0
65	
66	        try:
67	            if self.step_wait_before_ms > 0:
68	                self.page.wait_for_timeout(self.step_wait_before_ms)
69	            self.logger.log_step_start(
70	                step_no=action.step_no,
71	                raw_text=action.raw_text,
72	                action=action.action,
73	                locator=loc_repr,
74	                value=action.value,
75	            )
76	            resolved_html = self._dispatch(action)
77	        except Exception as e:
78	            err = f"{type(e).__name__}: {e}"
79	            status = "FAIL"
80	
81	        # 自愈
82	        if status == "FAIL" and self.healer is not None and action.action != "assert" and is_healable(err or ""):
83	            self.logger.console.print(f"  [yellow]↻ self-heal triggered for step {action.step_no}[/yellow]")
84	
85	            def _retry(new_action: Action) -> tuple[bool, Optional[str]]:
86	                try:
87	                    self._dispatch(new_action)
88	                    return True, None
89	                except Exception as e2:
90	                    return False, f"{type(e2).__name__}: {e2}"
91	
92	            heal = self.healer.heal(action, err or "", _retry)
93	            heal_attempts = heal.attempts
94	            if heal.healed and heal.new_action is not None:
95	                status = "HEALED"
96	                err = None
97	                loc_repr = locator_repr(heal.new_action.locator) if heal.new_action.locator else loc_repr
98	                action = heal.new_action
99	            else:
100	                err = heal.final_error or err
101	
102	        duration = int((time.time() - t0) * 1000)
103	        shot = None
104	        need_shot = (status == "FAIL" and self.shot_fail) or (status != "FAIL" and self.shot_every)
105	        if need_shot:
106	            shot = self._screenshot(action.step_no, status)
107	
108	        result = StepResult(
109	            step_no=action.step_no,
110	            raw_text=action.raw_text,
111	            action=action.action,
112	            locator_repr=loc_repr,
113	            status=status,
114	            duration_ms=duration,
115	            error=err,
116	            screenshot=str(shot) if shot else None,
117	            resolved_html=resolved_html,
118	            heal_attempts=heal_attempts,
119	            code=render_action(action),
120	        )
121	        self.logger.log_step(result)
122	        return result
123	
124	    # ---------- private ----------
125	    def _dispatch(self, a: Action) -> Optional[str]:
126	        timeout = a.timeout_ms or self.default_timeout
127	        loc = resolve_locator(self.page, a.locator) if a.locator else None
128	        resolved = None
129	        if loc is not None:
130	            try:
131	                resolved = loc.first.evaluate("el => el.outerHTML.slice(0, 200)")
132	            except Exception:
133	                resolved = None
134	
135	        act = a.action
136	        if act == "goto":
137	            self.page.goto(a.value, timeout=timeout)
138	        elif act == "reload":
139	            self.page.reload(timeout=timeout)
140	        elif act == "go_back":
141	            self.page.go_back(timeout=timeout)
142	        elif act == "fill":
143	            loc.fill(a.value, timeout=timeout)
144	        elif act == "type":
145	            loc.type(a.value, timeout=timeout)
146	        elif act == "clear":
147	            loc.clear(timeout=timeout)
148	        elif act == "press":
149	            loc.press(a.value, timeout=timeout)
150	        elif act == "click":
151	            # combobox 输入框常被透明 placeholder 遮挡, 用 force=True
152	            if loc.evaluate("el => el.getAttribute('role')") == "combobox":
153	                loc.click(timeout=timeout, force=True)
154	            else:
155	                loc.click(timeout=timeout)
156	        elif act == "dblclick":
157	            loc.dblclick(timeout=timeout)
158	        elif act == "hover":
159	            loc.hover(timeout=timeout)
160	        elif act == "check":
161	            loc.check(timeout=timeout)
162	        elif act == "uncheck":
163	            loc.uncheck(timeout=timeout)
164	        elif act == "select_option":
165	            loc.select_option(a.value, timeout=timeout)
166	        elif act == "upload_file":
167	            loc.set_input_files(a.value, timeout=timeout)
168	        elif act == "wait_for":
169	            loc.wait_for(state=a.state or "visible", timeout=timeout)
170	        elif act == "wait_for_url":
171	            self.page.wait_for_url(a.value, timeout=timeout)
172	        elif act == "wait_timeout":
173	            self.page.wait_for_timeout(int(a.value))
174	        elif act == "scroll_into_view":
175	            loc.scroll_into_view_if_needed(timeout=timeout)
176	        elif act == "screenshot":
177	            pass
178	        elif act == "assert":
179	            self._assert(loc, a)
180	        else:
181	            raise ValueError(f"未支持的 action: {act}")
182	
183	        return resolved
184	
185	    def _assert(self, loc, a: Action) -> None:
186	        timeout = a.timeout_ms or self.default_timeout
187	        t = a.assertion.type
188	        exp = a.assertion.expected
189	        ignore_case = a.assertion.ignore_case
190	        if t == "visible":          expect(loc).to_be_visible(timeout=timeout)
191	        elif t == "hidden":         expect(loc).to_be_hidden(timeout=timeout)
192	        elif t == "enabled":        expect(loc).to_be_enabled(timeout=timeout)
193	        elif t == "disabled":       expect(loc).to_be_disabled(timeout=timeout)
194	        elif t == "checked":        expect(loc).to_be_checked(timeout=timeout)
195	        elif t == "contains_text":  expect(loc).to_contain_text(str(exp), ignore_case=ignore_case, timeout=timeout)
196	        elif t == "has_text":       expect(loc).to_have_text(str(exp), ignore_case=ignore_case, timeout=timeout)
197	        elif t == "has_value":      expect(loc).to_have_value(str(exp), timeout=timeout)
198	        elif t == "has_count":      expect(loc).to_have_count(int(exp), timeout=timeout)
199	        elif t == "url_matches":
200	            import re as _re
201	            # 默认按"包含"语义: 把字符串转成 substring 正则; 若已是 re.Pattern 则直接用
202	            pattern = exp if hasattr(exp, "search") else _re.compile(_re.escape(str(exp)))
203	            expect(self.page).to_have_url(pattern, timeout=timeout)
204	        else:
205	            raise ValueError(f"未支持的 assertion: {t}")
206	
207	    def _screenshot(self, step_no: int, status: str) -> Path:
208	        path = self.reports_dir / f"step_{step_no:03d}_{status.lower()}.png"
209	        try:
210	            self.page.screenshot(path=str(path), full_page=False)
211	        except Exception:
212	            pass
213	        return path

110	def build_user_prompt(step_text: str, step_no: int, url: str, page_hint: str | None = None) -> str:
111	    parts = [
112	        f"步骤: {step_text}",
113	        f"步骤序号: {step_no}",
114	        f"目标 URL: {url}",
115	    ]
116	    if page_hint:
117	        parts.append(f"页面上下文 (DOM 摘要):\n{page_hint}")
118	    parts.append("\n请输出一个符合 schema 的 JSON 对象.")
119	    return "\n".join(parts)

```text
133	def snapshot(page: Any, limit: int = 80) -> str:
134	    """返回紧凑文本, 含 scope (父容器) + viewport 信息, 便于 LLM 区分同名元素."""
135	    try:
136	        items = page.evaluate(_SNAPSHOT_JS) or []
137	    except Exception:
138	        return ""
139	    lines = []
140	    for it in items[:limit]:
141	        is_container = it.get("tag") == "container"
142	        if is_container:
143	            parts = [f"container(.el-select)"]
144	            if it.get("haspopup"):
145	                parts.append(f"haspopup={it['haspopup']}")
146	            head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
147	        else:
148	            parts = [f"<{it['tag']}"]
149	            stable_id = it.get("id") or ""
150	            if stable_id:
151	                parts.append(f'id="{stable_id}"')
152	            for k in ("role", "name", "testid", "type", "placeholder", "haspopup"):
153	                v = it.get(k)
154	                if v:
155	                    parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
156	            # 同名元素序号
157	            idx = it.get("_idx", 0)
158	            if idx > 0:
159	                parts.append(f"#{idx}")
160	            head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
161	        text = it.get("text") or ""
162	        scope = it.get("scope") or ""
163	        suffix_parts = []
164	        if scope:
165	            suffix_parts.append(f"[scope={scope}]")
166	        # 只标注不在 viewport 内的元素 (LLM 需要知道它当前看不到)
167	        if not it.get("in_viewport", True):
168	            suffix_parts.append("[off-screen]")
169	        suffix = " " + " ".join(suffix_parts) if suffix_parts else ""
170	        lines.append(f"{head} {text}{suffix}".rstrip())
171	    return "\n".join(lines)
172
```
</details></tool-use>

6	## 严格规则

13	  第1优先: role       → get_by_role("button", name="登录")
14	  第2优先: text       → get_by_text("登录")
15	  第3优先: label      → get_by_label("用户名")
16	  第3优先: placeholder → get_by_placeholder("请输入手机号")
17	  最后:   css/xpath   → locator(".class > #id") 或 locator("xpath=...")
18	
19	**能用前 4 种就绝不用 css/xpath! 只有在前 4 种都无法唯一定位时才降级到 css.**

112	def build_user_prompt(step_text: str, step_no: int, url: str, page_hint: str | None = None) -> str:
113	    parts = [

117	    ]

**答案是：它不知道，碰巧蒙对了。**

脚本里的代码是：
```python
page.get_by_placeholder("请输入手机号").fill("15373137739")

没有带任何 scope 前缀，也没有 `nth` 字段。之所以能跑通，是因为：

1. 页面打开 `#/login` 路由后，**默认激活的是"登录"tab**
2. 登录 tab 的输入框在 DOM 顺序中排在前面

所以本质上是 **靠 DOM 顺序 + `.first` 兜底碰巧点中的**，而不是 LLM 真的"知道"要选登录 tab 下的。

**如果注册 tab 默认激活，就会填错。**

- 快照顶部的 `⚠ 重复元素` 提醒 LLM 注意区分
- Prompt 里明确要求不能用会命中多个的 locator
- `_dispatch` 加 strict mode violation → `.first` 兜底

但最根本的解决方式是让 LLM 用正确的 scope 来定位。看下缓存里存的原始 action：

8	from .parser import NaturalCase
9	from .prompts import FEW_SHOT_EXAMPLES, SYSTEM_PROMPT, build_user_prompt
10	from .schema import Action

12	
13	class Translator:
14	    def __init__(
15	        self,
16	        llm: BaseLLMClient,
17	        cache: ScriptCache,
18	        force_regenerate: bool = False,
19	    ) -> None:
20	        self.llm = llm
21	        self.cache = cache
22	        self.force = force_regenerate
23	
24	    def translate_step(
25	        self,
26	        case: NaturalCase,
27	        step_no: int,
28	        step_text: str,
29	        page_hint: Optional[str] = None,
30	        force_llm: bool = False,
31	        save_to_cache: bool = True,
32	    ) -> tuple[Action, bool]:
33	        """返回 (action, hit_cache).
34	
35	        force_llm=True       跳过缓存读取(用于自愈)
36	        save_to_cache=False  翻译结果不立即写入缓存(用于自愈, 等真正跑通后再由调用方写)
37	        """
38	        step_hash = case.step_hash(step_text)
39	
40	        if not self.force and not force_llm:
41	            cached = self.cache.load_step(case.name, step_no, step_hash)
42	            if cached is not None:
43	                return cached, True
44	
45	        user_prompt = build_user_prompt(step_text, step_no, case.url, page_hint)
46	        raw = self.llm.chat_json(SYSTEM_PROMPT, FEW_SHOT_EXAMPLES, user_prompt)
47	        # 强校验, 不符合 schema 立即报错
48	        raw["step_no"] = step_no
49	        raw["raw_text"] = step_text
50	        action = Action.model_validate(raw)
51	        if save_to_cache:
52	            self.cache.save_step(case.name, step_hash, action)
53	        return action, False
54	
55	    def commit_to_cache(self, case: NaturalCase, step_text: str, action: Action) -> None:
56	        """供自愈机制在 healed 验证通过后手动写缓存."""
57	        step_hash = case.step_hash(step_text)
58	        self.cache.save_step(case.name, step_hash, action)

155	def build_user_prompt(step_text: str, step_no: int, url: str, page_hint: str | None = None) -> str:
156	    parts = [
157	        f"步骤: {step_text}",
158	        f"步骤序号: {step_no}",
159	        f"目标 URL: {url}",
160	    ]
161	    if page_hint:
162	        parts.append(f"页面上下文 (DOM 摘要):\n{page_hint}")
163	    parts.append("\n请输出一个符合 schema 的 JSON 对象.")
164	    return "\n".join(parts)

14	@dataclass

16	    action: Action
17	    hit: bool

19	    page_hint: Optional[str] = None     # DOM 摘要

21	
22	class Translator:

39	        force_llm: bool = False,
40	        save_to_cache: bool = True,
41	    ) -> TranslateResult:
42	        """返回 TranslateResult, 含 action、缓存命中、用户提示词、DOM 摘要."""
43	        step_hash = case.step_hash(step_text)
44	
45	        if not self.force and not force_llm:
46	            cached = self.cache.load_step(case.name, step_no, step_hash)
47	            if cached is not None:
48	                user_prompt = build_user_prompt(step_text, step_no, case.url, page_hint)
49	                return TranslateResult(action=cached, hit=True, user_prompt=user_prompt, page_hint=page_hint or "")
50	
51	        user_prompt = build_user_prompt(step_text, step_no, case.url, page_hint)
52	        raw = self.llm.chat_json(SYSTEM_PROMPT, FEW_SHOT_EXAMPLES, user_prompt)
53	        # 强校验, 不符合 schema 立即报错
54	        raw["step_no"] = step_no
55	        raw["raw_text"] = step_text
56	        action = Action.model_validate(raw)
57	        if save_to_cache:
58	            self.cache.save_step(case.name, step_hash, action)
59	        return TranslateResult(action=action, hit=False, user_prompt=user_prompt, page_hint=page_hint or "")

```text
1	"""自愈: 步骤执行失败时, 带着当前 DOM 让 LLM 重新翻译, 然后重试.
2	
3	策略:
4	  - 仅对"定位/动作类异常"触发(超时/未找到等), 不对断言失败触发.
5	  - 单步最多 max_retries 次, 成功后回写缓存.
6	"""
7	from __future__ import annotations
8	
9	from dataclasses import dataclass
10	from typing import Any, Callable, Optional
11	
12	from .dom_snapshot import snapshot
13	from .parser import NaturalCase
14	from .schema import Action
15	from .translator import Translator
16	
17	
18	# 触发自愈的异常类型 (Playwright 抛出的多为 TimeoutError / Error)
19	def _is_locator_failure(err: BaseException) -> bool:
20	    msg = str(err).lower()
21	    keywords = ("timeout", "no element", "not found", "waiting for", "strict mode violation", "locator")
22	    return any(k in msg for k in keywords)
23	
24	
25	@dataclass
26	class HealResult:
27	    healed: bool
28	    attempts: int
29	    new_action: Optional[Action] = None
30	    final_error: Optional[str] = None
31	
32	
33	class SelfHealer:
34	    def __init__(
35	        self,
36	        translator: Translator,
37	        page: Any,
38	        case: NaturalCase,
39	        max_retries: int = 2,
40	    ) -> None:
41	        self.translator = translator
42	        self.page = page
43	        self.case = case
44	        self.max_retries = max_retries
45	
46	    def heal(
47	        self,
48	        action: Action,
49	        first_error: str,
50	        execute_fn: Callable[[Action], tuple[bool, Optional[str]]],
51	    ) -> HealResult:
52	        """尝试自愈. execute_fn(action) -> (ok, err).
53	
54	        关键: 翻译时不立即写缓存; 只在新 action 真的跑通后才 commit, 避免污染.
55	        """
56	        last_err = first_error
57	        for attempt in range(1, self.max_retries + 1):
58	            page_hint = snapshot(self.page)
59	            try:
60	                result = self.translator.translate_step(
61	                    self.case,
62	                    action.step_no,
63	                    action.raw_text,
64	                    page_hint=page_hint,
65	                    force_llm=True,
66	                    save_to_cache=False,
67	                )
68	                new_action = result.action
69	            except Exception as e:
70	                last_err = f"heal translate failed: {e}"
71	                continue
72	
73	            ok, err = execute_fn(new_action)
74	            if ok:
75	                # ★ 跑通了, 才把新版本写入缓存
76	                self.translator.commit_to_cache(self.case, action.raw_text, new_action)
77	                return HealResult(healed=True, attempts=attempt, new_action=new_action)
78	            last_err = err or "unknown"
79	
80	        return HealResult(healed=False, attempts=self.max_retries, final_error=last_err)
81	
82	
83	def is_healable(err_msg: str) -> bool:
84	    return _is_locator_failure(Exception(err_msg))
85
```
</details></tool-use>

15	class StepLogger:
16	    def __init__(self, log_file: Optional[Path] = None) -> None:
17	        self.console = Console()
18	        self._results: list["StepResult"] = []
19	        self._log = open(log_file, "a", encoding="utf-8") if log_file else None
20	
21	    def _write(self, text: str) -> None:
22	        if self._log:
23	            ts = datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")
24	            self._log.write(f"[{ts}] {text}\n")
25	            self._log.flush()

27	    # ---------- case 层 ----------
28	    def case_start(self, case_name: str, url: str, cache_hits: int, total: int) -> None:
29	        self.console.rule(f"[bold cyan]Case: {case_name}")
30	        self.console.print(f"URL    : [cyan]{url}[/cyan]")
31	        self.console.print(f"Cache  : [green]{cache_hits}/{total} HIT[/green]")
32	        self.console.print("")
33	        self._write(f"CASE START: {case_name}  URL={url}")
34	
35	    def case_end(self, total_ms: int, report_path: str) -> None:
36	        passed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "PASS")
37	        healed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "HEALED")
38	        failed = sum(1 for r in self._results if r.status == "FAIL")
39	        color = "green" if failed == 0 else "red"
40	        self.console.rule(style=color)
41	        self.console.print(f"Total: [{color}]{passed} passed[/{color}], [yellow]{healed} healed[/yellow], [red]{failed} failed[/red]   Duration: {total_ms}ms")
42	        self.console.print(f"Report: [cyan]{report_path}[/cyan]")
43	        self.console.rule(style=color)
44	        self._write(f"CASE END  pass={passed} healed={healed} fail={failed}  {total_ms}ms  report={report_path}")

46	    # ---------- step 层 ----------

49	        file_tag = "CACHE HIT" if cache_hit else "LLM CALL"

62	    def log_step_start(self, step_no: int, raw_text: str, action: str, locator: Optional[str], value: Optional[str]) -> None:
63	        """执行前预告：action + locator + value."""
64	        target = f" → {locator}" if locator else ""

69	    def log_step(self, r: "StepResult") -> None:

25	      // 稳定 id
26	      if (cur.id && !cur.id.startsWith('el-id-')) return '#' + cur.id;
27	      // 有意义的 role 容器
28	      const role = cur.getAttribute('role');
29	      if (role && ['tabpanel','dialog','menu','listbox','navigation','region','form'].includes(role)) {
30	        const id = cur.id || '';
31	        const label = cur.getAttribute('aria-label') || cur.getAttribute('aria-labelledby') || '';
32	        return `[role=${role}${id ? ' id=' + id : ''}${label ? ' aria-label="' + label + '"' : ''}]`;
33	      }
34	      // 有语义的 class 容器 (取前两个有意义的 class)
35	      if (cur.className && typeof cur.className === 'string') {

37	        if (classes.length > 0) {

40	      }
41	      cur = cur.parentElement;

43	    return '';

49	    const style = window.getComputedStyle(el);

55	    const cy = rect.y + rect.height / 2;
56	    const top = document.elementFromPoint(cx, cy);
57	    if (top && top !== el && !el.contains(top)) {
58	      // 中心点被其他不相关元素覆盖
59	      return false;
60	    }
61	    return true;
62	  }
63	
64	  function isInViewport(el) {
65	    const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
66	    const vh = window.innerHeight || document.documentElement.clientHeight;
67	    const vw = window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth;
68	    return rect.top >= 0 && rect.left >= 0 && rect.bottom <= vh && rect.right <= vw;
69	  }
70	
71	  // 抓取基础元素
72	  document.querySelectorAll(SEL).forEach(el => {
73	    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
74	    const item = {
75	      tag: el.tagName.toLowerCase(),
76	      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
77	      name: el.getAttribute('aria-label') || el.getAttribute('name') || '',
78	      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
79	      _id: el.id || '',
80	      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
81	      text: (el.innerText || el.value || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
82	      placeholder: el.getAttribute('placeholder') || '',
83	      type: el.getAttribute('type') || '',
84	      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
85	      scope: findScope(el),
86	      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
87	    };
88	    const key = JSON.stringify({
89	      tag: item.tag, role: item.role, placeholder: item.placeholder,
90	      text: item.text, scope: item.scope, id: item.id,
91	    });
92	    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
93	    if (count >= 3) return;
94	    seen.set(key, count + 1);
95	    item._idx = count;
96	    items.push(item);
97	  });
98	
99	  // 抓取组件容器
100	  document.querySelectorAll(CONTAINER_SEL).forEach(el => {
101	    if (!isVisible(el)) return;
102	    let innerId = '';
103	    const innerInput = el.querySelector('input');
104	    if (innerInput) innerId = innerInput.id || '';
105	    const item = {
106	      tag: 'container',
107	      role: el.getAttribute('role') || '',
108	      name: '',
109	      id: (el.id && !el.id.startsWith('el-id-')) ? el.id : '',
110	      _id: el.id || '',
111	      testid: el.getAttribute('data-testid') || '',
112	      text: (el.innerText || '').trim().slice(0, 40),
113	      placeholder: '',
114	      type: '',
115	      haspopup: el.getAttribute('aria-haspopup') || '',
116	      scope: findScope(el),
117	      inner_id: innerId,
118	      in_viewport: isInViewport(el),
119	    };
120	    const key = 'container:' + JSON.stringify({tag: 'container', text: item.text, scope: item.scope});
121	    const count = seen.get(key) || 0;
122	    if (count >= 3) return;
123	    seen.set(key, count + 1);
124	    item._idx = count;
125	    items.push(item);
126	  });
127	
128	  return items.slice(0, 80);
129	}
130	"""
131	
132	
133	def snapshot(page: Any, limit: int = 80) -> str:
134	    """返回紧凑文本, 含 scope (父容器) + viewport 信息, 便于 LLM 区分同名元素."""
135	    try:
136	        items = page.evaluate(_SNAPSHOT_JS) or []
137	    except Exception:
138	        return ""
139	    lines = []
140	
141	    # ---- 重复元素汇总, 放在头部提醒 LLM ----
142	    dup_counts: dict[str, int] = {}
143	    for it in items:
144	        key = _dup_key(it)
145	        dup_counts[key] = dup_counts.get(key, 0) + 1
146	    dups = {k: v for k, v in dup_counts.items() if v > 1}
147	    if dups:
148	        lines.append("⚠ 重复元素 (使用这些定位器会命中多个元素, 必须加 scope/nth/css 前缀来区分):")
149	        for k, cnt in dups.items():
150	            lines.append(f"  ×{cnt}  {k}")
151	        lines.append("")
152	
153	    for it in items[:limit]:
154	        is_container = it.get("tag") == "container"
155	        if is_container:
156	            parts = [f"container(.el-select)"]
157	            if it.get("haspopup"):
158	                parts.append(f"haspopup={it['haspopup']}")
159	            head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
160	        else:
161	            parts = [f"<{it['tag']}"]
162	            stable_id = it.get("id") or ""
163	            if stable_id:
164	                parts.append(f'id="{stable_id}"')
165	            for k in ("role", "name", "testid", "type", "placeholder", "haspopup"):
166	                v = it.get(k)
167	                if v:
168	                    parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
169	            # 同名元素序号
170	            idx = it.get("_idx", 0)
171	            if idx > 0:
172	                parts.append(f"#{idx}")
173	            head = " ".join(parts) + ">"
174	        text = it.get("text") or ""
175	        scope = it.get("scope") or ""
176	        suffix_parts = []
177	        if scope:
178	            suffix_parts.append(f"[scope={scope}]")
179	        # 只标注不在 viewport 内的元素 (LLM 需要知道它当前看不到)
180	        if not it.get("in_viewport", True):
181	            suffix_parts.append("[off-screen]")
182	        suffix = " " + " ".join(suffix_parts) if suffix_parts else ""
183	        lines.append(f"{head} {text}{suffix}".rstrip())
184	    return "\n".join(lines)
185	
186	
187	def _dup_key(it: dict) -> str:
188	    """生成重复检测的 key, 忽略 _idx/_id 等非视觉属性."""
189	    if it.get("tag") == "container":
190	        return f"container text={it.get('text','')}"
191	    parts = []
192	    for k in ("tag", "role", "name", "type", "placeholder"):
193	        v = it.get(k)
194	        if v:
195	            parts.append(f'{k}="{v}"')
196	    txt = it.get("text") or ""
197	    if txt:
198	        parts.append(f'text="{txt}"')
199	    return " ".join(parts)
200
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./core/prompts.py`

```text
11	## ★ Locator 策略优先级 (强制遵守, 从上到下尝试)
12	
13	  第1优先: role       → get_by_role("button", name="登录")
14	  第2优先: text       → get_by_text("登录")
15	  第3优先: label      → get_by_label("用户名")
16	  第3优先: placeholder → get_by_placeholder("请输入手机号")
17	  最后:   css/xpath   → locator(".class > #id") 或 locator("xpath=...")
18	
19	**能用前 4 种就绝不用 css/xpath! 只有在前 4 种都无法唯一定位时才降级到 css.**
20	
21	## ★ 意图严格匹配 (强制遵守)
22	
23	用例描述什么元素, 必须严格选什么元素, 不能用宽泛的定位:
24	
25	- 用例说 "点击 X 按钮" → 必须选 `<button>` 标签 (action=click, locator 用 role=button + name="X"), 不能用纯文本定位.
26	- 用例说 "点击 X 链接" → 必须选 `<a>` 标签 (role=link + name="X").
27	- 用例说 "点击 X 标签页/tab" → 必须选 role=tab + name="X".
28	- 用例说 "在 X 输入框输入" → 必须选 `<input>`/`<textarea>` 标签 (placeholder/label/role=textbox).
29	
30	### 用例没明说元素类型时的优先级 (重要)
31	
32	用例只说 "点击 X" 没有写 "按钮"/"链接"/"标签页" 时, 按以下顺序选元素 (从 DOM 摘要里挑):
33	
34	  1. **优先 button**: 如果 DOM 中有 `<button>` 名称/文本匹配 X, 选它 (用户操作"点击"几乎都是按钮)
35	  2. 其次 role=tab/menuitem/link/checkbox/radio: DOM 中有对应 role + name="X" 的交互元素
36	  3. 最后 a 链接: 没有按钮等交互元素, 才考虑 `<a>` 标签
37	  4. 兜底 text: 实在没有上述任何元素, 才用纯文本
38	
39	**例子**: 用例 "点击 登录"
40	- DOM 同时有 `<a>登录</a>` 和 `<button>登录</button>` → ✔ 选 `<button>` (`role=button name="登录"`)
41	- DOM 只有 `<a>登录</a>` → ✔ 选 `<a>` (`role=link name="登录"`)
42	- DOM 只有 `<span>登录</span>` 带 onclick → 选 `text=登录`
43	
44	**反例**:
45	- 用例: "点击登录按钮", DOM 中既有 `<a>登录</a>` 又有 `<button>登录</button>`
46	  ✗ 错误: `{"strategy": "text", "value": "登录"}` (会命中链接)
47	  ✗ 错误: `{"strategy": "css", "value": "#pane-login button"}` (虽然 scope 对了, 但没匹配 "登录" 文本)
48	  ✔ 正确: `{"strategy": "role", "role": "button", "name": "登录"}` (严格匹配按钮 + 名称)
49	  ✔ 正确 (有 scope 时): `{"strategy": "css", "value": "#pane-login button:has-text('登录')"}`
50	
51	**用例字面意图优先于 DOM 唯一性**: 即使页面上只有一个 "登录" 文本, 也不能用 text 策略代替 role=button.
52	
53	## Locator 唯一性 (★ 强制规则)
54	
55	**你必须基于 DOM 摘要里的真实元素来生成定位器, 禁止凭空猜测.**
56	
57	- **先检查 DOM 摘要顶部的"⚠ 重复元素"区域**: 如果列出了你打算用的定位器 (如 `placeholder=请输入手机号`), 说明它会命中多个元素, **绝对不能直接用**.
58	- **禁止依赖 `.first`** (框架不会自动取第一个, 必须显式指定第几个).
59	- **推荐用 nth 字段**: 结合 DOM 摘要里元素后缀的 `#0`/`#1` 序号, 在 locator 里加 `"nth": 0` 选第一个, `"nth": 1` 选第二个.
